data.title: Add auth marker cleanup to cleanup-claude-session.sh
data.description:
## Description

Add cleanup of worktree isolation auth marker files to plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh for session-end cleanup.

### Implementation:
1. Add a cleanup step that removes /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-* files where the PID inside is dead
2. This handles normal session-end cleanup (orchestrator should also explicitly remove its own marker, but this is the safety net)
3. Log cleanup actions for observability

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)
- tests/scripts/test-cleanup-claude-session.sh (CREATE or EDIT — add test for marker cleanup)

### Test filename compatibility
Source: cleanup-claude-session.sh → normalized: cleanupclaudesessionsh
Test: test-cleanup-claude-session.sh → normalized: testcleanupclaudesessionsh
Contains cleanupclaudesessionsh? Yes ✓

### TDD Requirement
RED: Write test that creates stale marker files, runs cleanup, asserts markers are removed
GREEN: Add cleanup logic to cleanup-claude-session.sh

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Stale auth markers are removed by cleanup script
  Verify: MARKER=$(mktemp /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-XXXXXX) && echo 99999 > "$MARKER" && bash plugins/dso/scripts/cleanup-claude-session.sh 2>/dev/null; test ! -f "$MARKER"
- [ ] Test for cleanup exists and passes
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-cleanup-claude-session.sh 2>/dev/null || echo "test file will be created"
